name: devcamp-slides
description: 딩코딩코 부트캠프 발표 슬라이드 (Marp + DEVELOPER RPG 테마)

scripts.build:weekly: marp --pdf --html -I weekly-kickoff -o dist/weekly-kickoff && marp --html -I weekly-kickoff -o dist/weekly-kickoff
scripts.build:tech: marp --pdf --html -I tech-talk      -o dist/tech-talk      && marp --html -I tech-talk      -o dist/tech-talk
scripts.build:offline: marp --pdf --html -I offline        -o dist/offline        && marp --html -I offline        -o dist/offline
